---
title: "Map Gallery"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
editor: source
---

## Map Gallery

This gallery showcases cartographic layouts and spatial visualizations developed during my studies in geomatics and GIS.

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

![](images/harmonized_maps.png){.gallery-img}

### Harmonized Land-Cover Maps

Comparison of harmonized land-cover datasets used to analyze agricultural transitions in the Lower Fraser Valley.

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

![](images/change_map2.png){.gallery-img}

### Change Detection Map

Spatial representation of land-cover change across the study area between analysis periods.

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

![](images/adjacency.png){.gallery-img}

### Agricultural Adjacency Analysis

Visualization of adjacency and interspersion patterns between annual and perennial agriculture.

:::

::::


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

![](images/agriculture_map.png){.gallery-img}

### Agricultural Distribution Map

Spatial distribution of agricultural land classes derived from harmonized land-cover datasets.

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

![](images/lidar_chm.png){.gallery-img}

### LiDAR Canopy Height Model

Canopy height model generated from LiDAR point clouds to represent forest structure.

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

![](images/tree_detection.png){.gallery-img}

### Individual Tree Detection

Visualization of individual tree segmentation derived from LiDAR-based analysis.

:::

::::
